The '''''Song of the Clouds''''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Manollium-class herdship|''Manollium''-class herdship]].

==History==
It was one of the many [[Ithorian Herdship]]s which could travel between [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Vop]] the Usurer had planned to buy a sealed lockbox from the Ithorians on the ship, but was undermined by the actions of his rival, [[Ritinki]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|15|The Great Herdship Heist}} {{1st}}

*<!-- 2012-10-02 -->''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''
